verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God made me a winner, I'm an overcomer Free from the law of sin and death, I am I've been redeemed By the blood of the Lamb Satan no longer tramples on me, I've been given authority, Through what took place at Calvary God made me a winner!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Romans 8: 37 tells me, The scripture was written there just for me My status is in Galatians 3: 13 In John 1 and 12, I'm a child of the King. Isaiah 53: 5 says I'm healed, Ephesians 4: 30 says I've been sealed No one can take from me What God has revealed. God made me a winner!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Got no time for mediocrity No time for ruling into self-pity, I spend each day Just praising the Lord, you see Thanking Him for the Word He's given me No need for feeling down in doubt I don't accept all fear and doubt I believe God's word, I confess it out loud God made me a winner!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I believe God's word I confess it out loud, God made me a winner!
